title: Champagne PIAFF Brut NV 75cl | Crowd Pleasing Premium Champagne with Brioche, Apple and Pear Notes and a Magnificent Persistent Mousse
features: The Ultimate Crowd-Pleaser – A lively Champagne that demands the spotlight! 35% Pinot Noir, 30% Pinot Meunier, 35% Chardonnay. This Champagne delivers apple, pear, and citrus notes with a touch of brioche, making every sip effortlessly enjoyable.

Expertly Crafted for Vibrancy – Made in Épernay by 5th-generation winemaker Maxime Mansard, this fresh, modern brut Champagne is crafted to perfection, combining finesse, depth, and a signature playful character that’s perfect for any gathering.

The Perfect Bottle for Sharing – This is sparkling wine designed to bring people together. Whether toasting milestones or enjoying spontaneous celebrations, this easy-drinking Champagne gift adds a sense of occasion to any moment.

Elegance in Every Pour – Presented in a stylish Champagne bottle, this highly acclaimed sparkling wine offers a fine, persistent mousse that elevates any social setting—because great company deserves great bubbles!

A Guaranteed Crowd Favourite – Recognised for its outstanding quality, this award-winning brut Champagne is an essential for any party, gathering, or toast. For those who love to celebrate, this is the ultimate Champagne gifts selection.
